property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.2.13-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;\\?\C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\JetBrains\IntelliJIdea2026.1\aia\codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0AQzQNr;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.2.13-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\EMS UNIVALLE - UPSA\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\HP\anaconda3;C:\Users\HP\anaconda3\Library\mingw-w64\bin;C:\Users\HP\anaconda3\Library\usr\bin;C:\Users\HP\anaconda3\Library\bin;C:\Users\HP\anaconda3\Scripts;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3.4\bin;C:\VS\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1.3\bin;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;.
